chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 422 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1772/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.1773/2022 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 21-04-2022 Petitioner present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Through this Petition, the Petitioner has sought the following relief(s): a. That this Honourable Court may be pleased to hand over the possession of plot in scheme being No. 70, admeasuring 1200 Sq yards situated Gulshan Reehan Memon Phase-II Near DPO office Hamid Shah Bungalow Taluka and District Khairpur Mirs. b. That this Honourable Court may be pleased to grant any other equitable relief which this Honourable Court may deem fit and proper in the circumstances of the above case. c. To award the cost of the Petition. We have perused the Petition and are of the view that the Petition is not maintainable as the relief for possession cannot be granted in a Constitutional Petition. Petitioner, while confronted, is not in a position to assist us; however, the Petitioner has to seek appropriate alternate remedy. In view of such position, Petition is dismissed in limine with pending application; whereas, Petitioner may seek appropriate remedy in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
